items.name: Bear Lake (Manistee)
items.description: Large inland lake in Manistee County used for public portal smoke and fixture tests.

items.name: North Lake Leelanau
items.description: Northern basin of Lake Leelanau; clear, deep glacial lake known for cold-water fish.

items.name: South Lake Leelanau
items.description: Southern basin of Lake Leelanau; shallower and more fertile.
